title: Crispy Gnocchi Caesar Salad
summary: We’ve swapped the croutons in a classic caesar salad with moreish, filled crispy gnocchi. It’s a real winner.

ingredients.label: La Famiglia Rana Garlic & Mozzarella Filled Pan Fry Gnocchi
ingredients.name: La Famiglia Rana Garlic & Mozzarella Filled Pan Fry Gnocchi

method.description: For the dressing, finely grate the garlic into a bowl. Add ½ the anchovies and mash with a fork to create a paste then stir through the mayo, mustard, the juice of the lemon and ½ the grated Parmesan. Season with salt and pepper. If it’s too thick, stir through a splash of cold water.
Roughly tear the lettuce and pick the parsley leaves (discarding the stalks) then toss with the rocket.

Heat a frying pan with a drizzle of olive oil or some butter as you prefer. Once hot, add the La Famiglia Rana Garlic & Mozzarella Filled Pan-Fry Gnocchi and pan-fry for at least 5 mins until crispy and golden.
Toss the salad mixture into the dressing, with the remaining anchovies, capers, and remaining grated Parmesan. Share between plates and top with the crispy gnocchi.

chefs.name: Chloe René
chefs.summary: Chloe (@chlo_eat) takes inspiration from her diverse upbringing to create recipes and dishes influenced from cultures around the world. Despite her classical training, Chloe's philosophy in the kitchen revolves around simplicity and home-cooking. She firmly believes that the essence of a great meal lies in the quality of ingredients and the care put into their preparation. Instead of relying on complex and technical processes, Chloe prizes the art of letting ingredients shine through, enhancing their natural flavours with a delicate touch.
